value: Hi there! I'm glad you're enjoying your journey on the East Coast train. I understand the sun glare is making it difficult to see your screen—that's frustrating. While I can't install blinds during your current trip, I'd suggest asking the onboard staff if they can help adjust the window coverings or find you a seat in a shadier area of the carriage. They'll be happy to assist. Thanks for the feedback, and we appreciate you traveling with us!
